mapper.select:
select
ds.id, ds.room_id, ds.user_id, ds.total_score, ds.comment, ds.scored_by, ds.scored_time, ds.professional_score, ds.communication_score, ds.teamwork_score, ds.emergency_score, ds.learning_score,
dr.room_name, dr.topic, dr.max_member_count, dr.duration_minutes, dr.current_member_count, dr.start_time, dr.end_time,
si.NAME AS staff_name, si.staff_sex AS staff_sex, si.images AS staff_images, si.phone AS staff_phone,
from discussion_score ds left join discussion_room dr on (dr.id = ds.room_id) left join staff_info si on (si.id = ds.user_id) where 1 = 1
AND dr.room_name like CONCAT("%",#{queryForm.roomName},"%")
AND dr.topic like CONCAT("%",#{queryForm.topic},"%")
AND si.NAME like CONCAT("%",#{queryForm.staffName},"%")
order by ds.scored_time desc
